creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
The current numpy in ports (1.6.2) doesn't build with python3.3.

Fix: Apply the following patch to the port:
---------- patch ----------
How-To-Repeat: 	Try building numpy 1.6.2 with python3.3. It fails;

In file included from numpy/core/src/multiarray/multiarraymodule_onefile.c:10:0
:
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalartypes.c.src: In function 'string_arrtype_new':
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalartypes.c.src:2326:45: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' h
as no member named 'length'
In file included from numpy/core/src/multiarray/multiarraymodule_onefile.c:10:0
:
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalartypes.c.src: In function 'unicode_arrtype_new':
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalartypes.c.src:2326:45: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' h
as no member named 'length'
In file included from numpy/core/src/multiarray/multiarraymodule_onefile.c:11:0
:
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalarapi.c: In function 'PyArray_Scalar':
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalarapi.c:704:16: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' has no m
ember named 'str'
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalarapi.c:705:16: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' has no m
ember named 'defenc'
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalarapi.c:706:16: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' has no m
ember named 'hash'
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalarapi.c:718:16: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' has no m
ember named 'str'
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalarapi.c:719:16: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' has no m
ember named 'str'
numpy/core/src/multiarray/scalarapi.c:720:16: error: 'PyUnicodeObject' has no m
ember named 'length'

:

numpy/core/src/multiarray/arraytypes.c.src:591:35: warning: assignment from inc
ompatible pointer type [enabled by default]

:

ject *' but argument is of type 'struct PyArrayObject *'

ect *' but argument is of type 'struct PySliceObject *'

of 'PySlice_GetIndices' from incompatible pointer type [enabled by default]
